description: REAL prose sentences from the Express.js README (raw.githubusercontent), grounding sources for the PAGES transcript test.
passages: If this is a brand new project, make sure to create a package.json first with the npm init command.
Express does not force you to use any specific ORM or template engine.

Examples To view the examples, clone the Express repository: Then install the dependencies: Then run whichever example you want: Contributing The Express.js project welcomes all constructive contributions.
See the [Contributing Guide] for more technical details on contributing.
By participating, you are expected to uphold this code.
Security Issues If you discover a security vulnerability in Express, please see Security Policies and Procedures.
